scope.interpretation_note: F1 naming belongs to stack-conformance remediation line; therefore assessed phases are G0/G1/D1/D2/D3/R1/R2/E1/S1.

phase_matrix.summary: В repo есть baseline/vocabulary docs, но truth-source контур сейчас не взаимоcогласован: baseline конфликтует с STATUS, а phase10/F1 документы содержат unsupported claims про ADR-removal технологий.
Registry/validator/tests/CI landed, но gate не fail-closed на все claim-carrying surfaces: phase10/red-team can overclaim while validator still passes.

phase_matrix.scope_reading: physical Delta closure for agreed slice
phase_matrix.summary: Physical Delta runtime landed: code writes/reads Delta tables and disprover removes parquet data while metadata remains.

phase_matrix.scope_reading: Spark execution closure for agreed slice
phase_matrix.summary: Executable Spark job landed for canonical bars proof slice; broader distributed/orchestrated closure remains outside accepted contour.

phase_matrix.scope_reading: Dagster execution closure for agreed slice
phase_matrix.summary: Dagster definitions/proof/test surfaces exist for bounded materialization contour; broader orchestration closure remains partial.

phase_matrix.scope_reading: durable runtime default and service closure
phase_matrix.summary: Staging/production profiles now fail-closed to Postgres, and FastAPI ASGI runtime is real and smoke-covered.
Aiogram mismatch remains unresolved: custom Telegram engine exists, aiogram still chosen in spec, registry says planned, yet phase route says accepted.
Real in-repo .NET sidecar and compiled-binary Python smoke are present, but immutable build/test/publish evidence is not durably surfaced in the repo/CI.
Ghost chosen technologies remain: spec still marks several tools chosen, registry marks them planned, and no ADR-backed removals are visible in the stack ADR set.

global_findings: Real implementation evidence exists for Delta, Spark, Dagster, fail-closed Postgres/FastAPI runtime, and in-repo .NET sidecar.
Governance truth-source alignment is still broken across STATUS, baseline, registry, stack spec, ADR set, and phase-10/F1 reports.
Machine gate landed but does not yet fail closed on all acceptance-report surfaces.
F1 cannot be honestly closed until truth-source drift, replaceable-stack ghost states, contracts_freeze, real_broker_process, and production_readiness are resolved.
f1_closure_workstreams: F1-F: operational readiness closure and final release decision
